title: The size of Eva Mark 6
wikitext:
[]: The size of Eva Mark. 6             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Thu May 13, 2021 10:17 pm Hi! I stumbled upon a post in Taringa regarding the size of Eva Mark 6. More especifically, the OP stated that the Eva is bigger than the regular Evas (i.e. 00-03). As evidence he gives a size comparison between Eva hands, first, Kaworu sitting on the fingertip of Mark 6: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: The size of Eva Mark. 6             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu May 13, 2021 10:51 pm The shot of Kaworu sitting on the finger could be a minor exaggeration, though it wouldn't be out of the question for the Mk.06 to be ever so slightly larger. The most dramatic difference is definitely between Unit 13 and the Mk.06 in Terminal Dogma, though we don't know what happened to it during the fourteen-year timeskip. We know humans modified it, somehow-- did they make it larger? Or did it increase in size when it fused with Lilith? Does being a vessel for the 12th angel have anything to do with this? I'm hesitant to say it was just a continuity issue, but at the same time I wouldn't want to seize on the idea of it canonically growing in size. Those seem like the most reasonable options, though.

[]: Re: The size of Eva Mark. 6             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat May 15, 2021 3:05 pm While NTE's size issues are far less rampant than NGE's, I guess this would be proof that they do still exist. Fwiw, in most merch lines Mark.06 is a little bit bigger than the rest on most figures, but not nearly to the extent that it lines up with the hand comparison

[]: Re: The size of Eva Mark. 6             Quote Post by bobgoesw00t » Sun May 16, 2021 3:01 pm Holy crap while there is a small difference, there is indeed some and HOW AM I JUST NOW SEEING THIS!?!?!? xD

[]: Re: The size of Eva Mark. 6             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed May 26, 2021 4:29 pm For what is worth, we have another shot of a human being next to a Eva hand in Q, when Mark.09 come pick up Shinji: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: The size of Eva Mark. 6             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed May 26, 2021 7:25 pm And we later see the Mark.09 with Unit 02' crawling all over it, which would suggest relative standardization between those units. And as it happens, Unit 02 picks up and carries Shinji in 2.0. Perhaps this really was just an animation goof.

[]: Re: The size of Eva Mark. 6             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Thu Sep 02, 2021 12:27 pm Just a quick necromance: Official Eva merchandise from 3.0+1.0 shows a lineup of all Eva units seen in NTE, and indeed, Mark 6 is slightly larger than the regular Production Model Eva: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: The size of Eva Mark. 6             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Sep 02, 2021 6:28 pm so that confirms what we've pretty much speculated for a while. On an aside - damn, I didn't realize just how massive the 4As and 07s were. also I will not stand for this 04 erasure

[]: Re: The size of Eva Mark. 6             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Thu Sep 02, 2021 8:45 pm Blockio wrote: also I will not stand for this 04 erasure
